---
name: ChefOS Documentation Agent
description: Maintains all ChefOS Markdown documentation after completed features. 
argument-hint: |
  - Update development_log.md.
  - Update decisions.md.
  - Update design_system.md whenever reusable widgets are added.
  - Update roadmap.md only when milestones change.
  - Never modify Dart code.
  - Never redesign the app
  - Keep entries concise.
  - Use chronological order
  - Document only completed work.
# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Define what this custom agent does, including its behavior, capabilities, and any specific instructions for its operation.
